title: AXLE: A Cloud Infrastructure for Lean 4 Theorem Proving Utilities
abstract: arXiv:2606.26442v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: We present AXLE (Axiom Lean Engine), a cloud service for Lean 4 proof manipulation, extraction, and verification. Recent progress in AI for mathematics -- reinforcement learning pipelines, agentic proving workflows, dataset curation -- demands Lean 4 tooling that scales to millions of requests while remaining correct and robust; existing infrastructure offers parallel compilation but not scalable proof verification, higher-level proof manipulation, multi-version support, or per-request isolation at the throughput modern AI workflows require. AXLE provides 14 Lean 4 metaprogramming tools spanning strict proof verification, declaration metadata extraction, semantic source manipulation, deterministic proof repair and simplification, and lemma extraction. The service runs as a multi-tenant cloud deployment with per-request isolation and concurrent support for multiple Lean 4 and Mathlib versions, accessible via a Python SDK, command-line i

translated_title: AXLE：面向Lean 4定理证明工具的云基础设施
translated_abstract: 我们提出了AXLE（公理精益引擎），这是一个用于Lean 4证明操作、提取和验证的云服务。近年来人工智能在数学领域的进展——强化学习管线、智能体证明工作流、数据集整理——对Lean 4工具提出了新的需求：在保持正确性和鲁棒性的同时，能够扩展到数百万次请求；现有的基础设施提供并行编译，但无法满足现代AI工作流所需的可扩展证明验证、高级证明操作、多版本支持或单请求隔离。AXLE提供了14个Lean 4元编程工具，涵盖严格证明验证、声明元数据提取、语义级源码操作、确定性证明修复与简化，以及引理提取。该服务以多租户云部署方式运行，支持单请求隔离，并同时支持多个Lean 4和Mathlib版本，可通过Python SDK和命令行界面访问。
tldr: 提出了AXLE云服务，通过14个元编程工具和单请求隔离架构，解决了现有Lean 4基础设施在AI数学工作流中缺乏可扩展证明验证、高级操作和多版本支持的问题。
en_tdlr: AXLE is a cloud service that addresses the lack of scalable proof verification, advanced manipulation, and multi-version support in existing Lean 4 infrastructure for AI-driven mathematics workflows, providing 14 metaprogramming tools with per-request isolation.
